Dialog.name: MSG_725_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 6}Uh... Is it just me, or does it seem like she wants to fight...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}What!? Her power readings... They're off the charts! ...Who IS she!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 1 202}I make my living as an elevator attendant, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_2_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 1 202}I know several effective ways to inflict pain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_2_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 1 202}Don't worry, I'm not as fragile as I look. Try to kill me... if you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 1 202}Magnificent! Your power is every bit as impressive as I'd hoped...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_3_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 1 202}But, the curtain has just risen... Show me your best performance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_4_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 1 202}The performance is underway. I shall give you something to remember![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_725_5_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 1 202}And now, I give you the grand finale![n]{f 1 1}
